cmd.app_tour_done: Ana fara yawon shakatawa — yi amfani da Na Gaba don bin matakai.
cmd.app_tour_hint: Yawon shakatawa mai jagora na manyan abubuwan
cmd.clear_my_answers_done: Tabbatar a cikin akwatin don share amsoshinka.
cmd.clear_my_answers_hint: Sake saita martaninka kan wannan aikin
cmd.clear_workspace_hint: Yana cire abubuwan da ke ciki da tarihi — yana tambaya tukuna
cmd.create_lesson_done: Ana fara aikin darasi game da “
cmd.create_lesson_done3: — AlloBot zai jagoranci matakai na gaba.
cmd.create_lesson_done_blank: Ana fara aikin darasi mai jagora — AlloBot zai tambaye ka batunka.
cmd.create_lesson_hint: Yana fara aikin mai jagora — faɗa batu da aji
cmd.cycle_reading_theme_hint: Zagaya dumi, sepia, duhu, mai dacewa da dyslexia, da sauransu
cmd.export_pack_hint: Sauke darasin a matsayin fayil mai cikakke
cmd.font_reset_done: An sake saita girman rubutun zuwa tsoho.
cmd.generate_analysis_hint: Gudanar da nazarin tushe kan abubuwan da ke yanzu
cmd.generate_glossary_hint: Ƙirƙiri ƙamus daga abubuwan da ke yanzu
cmd.generate_outline_hint: Ƙirƙiri tsari daga abubuwan da ke yanzu
cmd.generate_quiz_done: Ana ƙirƙirar gwaji daga wannan abun ciki…
cmd.generate_quiz_hint: Ƙirƙiri gwaji daga abubuwan da ke yanzu
cmd.generate_sentence_frames_hint: Ƙirƙiri tsarin jimloli daga abubuwan da ke yanzu
cmd.generate_simplified_done: Ana ƙirƙirar sigar da ta fi sauƙi…
cmd.generate_simplified_hint: Ƙirƙiri matakin karatu mai sauƙi — faɗa “zuwa aji N” don buri
cmd.launch_flashcards_hint: Yi karatun wannan ƙamus a matsayin tarin katunan flashcard
cmd.line_spacing_less_done: An saita tazara tsakanin layi zuwa
cmd.line_spacing_more_done: An saita tazara tsakanin layi zuwa
cmd.open_class_session_hint: Fara ko shiga zaman aji kai tsaye
cmd.open_community_catalog_hint: Bincika darussan al'umma da aka raba
cmd.open_document_builder_hint: Gina da fitar da takardu daban-daban
cmd.open_educator_hub_done: An buɗe Cibiyar Malamai — katin Document Pipeline yana kusa da sama.
cmd.open_educator_hub_hint: Kayan aikin darasi + katin Document Pipeline
cmd.open_export_menu_hint: Fitar da abubuwan da ke yanzu
cmd.open_lumen_done: An buɗe Lumen a cikin STEM Lab.
cmd.open_lumen_hint: Mayar da bayanan tantancewa zuwa zane-zane
cmd.open_persona_chat_hint: Yi hira da Persona na AI game da wannan batu
cmd.open_project_settings_hint: AI, rubutu ta murya, da iyaka na Socratic kowane aiki
cmd.open_sel_hub_hint: Kayan koyo na zamantakewa da motsin rai
cmd.open_stem_lab_hint: Kayan kimiyya da lissafi masu mu'amala
cmd.open_submission_inbox: Buɗe akwatin aikace-aikacen da aka mika
cmd.open_submission_inbox_done: An buɗe akwatin aikace-aikacen da aka mika.
cmd.open_submission_inbox_hint: Duba aikin da ɗalibai suka mika
cmd.pipeline_downloads_done: Sashen Saukarwa — PDF da aka yi wa tag shi ne kwafin da ya shirya raba.
cmd.pipeline_fix_again: Sake gudanar da gyaran samun dama
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_done: Ana gudanar da wani zagayen gyara…
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_hint: Wani zagayen gyara don ƙara maki
cmd.pipeline_issues_more2: ƙari a cikin panel ɗin Matsaloli.
cmd.pipeline_jump_miss: Wannan sashen ba ya kan allo a yanzu.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_done: An share — loda sabuwar takarda don farawa.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_hint: Share wannan sakamako sannan loda sabon fayil
cmd.pipeline_score_hint: Yana faɗar na yanzu kafin → bayan
cmd.pipeline_score_none: Babu gudanar da gyaran da aka buɗe.
cmd.pipeline_stop: Dakatar da gyaran da ke gudana
cmd.pipeline_stop_done: Ana dakatarwa bayan zagayen na yanzu.
cmd.pipeline_stop_hint: Dakatar bayan zagayen na yanzu — yana kiyaye abin da aka gama
cmd.pipeline_tour: Nuna mini ko'ina cikin waɗannan sakamakon
cmd.pipeline_tour_hint: Yawon shakatawa na daƙiƙa 60 na sakamakon gyara
cmd.read_this_page_done: An buɗe mai karatun shafi — zaɓi inda za a fara.
cmd.report_problem_done: An buɗe mai bayar da rahoton matsala.
cmd.report_problem_hint: Buɗe mai bayar da rahoton matsala
cmd.stop_reading_done: An dakatar da karatu da ƙarfi.
cmd.switch_theme_done: An canza jigon — ana zagayowa haske, sannan duhu, sannan babban bambanci.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_consent: Ana buɗe akwatin yardar daidaita gajimare — tabbatar a can don kunna shi.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_hint: Daidaita aikinka zuwa gajimare (yana tambayar yarda a karon farko)
cmd.toggle_color_overlay_hint: Zagaya wani launi mai laushi a kan shafin
cmd.toggle_focus_mode_done: An saita yanayin mai da hankali.
cmd.toggle_help_mode_done: An saita yanayin taimako — danna kowane sarrafawa don koyo game da shi.
cmd.toggle_help_mode_hint: Danna komai don koyon abin da yake yi
cmd.toggle_line_focus: Saita mai da hankali kan layi
cmd.toggle_line_focus_done: An saita mai da hankali kan layi.
cmd.toggle_line_focus_hint: Haskaka layi ɗaya a kowane lokaci
cmd.toggle_reading_ruler_hint: Layin jagora mai motsi don bibiya
cmd.translate_document_done2: sannan an haskaka maɓallin — danna Fassara don gudanar da shi. (Fassara tana amfani da quota na AI, don haka dannawa naka ne.)
cmd.translate_document_hint: Yana cika harshe tukuna sannan ya nuna maɓallin
cmd.translate_document_pick: An haskaka sarrafa fassara — zaɓi harshe sannan danna Fassara.
cmd.undo_settings_done: An mayar da saitunanka na baya (idan da canjin da za a soke).
cmd.undo_settings_hint: Mayar da saitunan darasi na baya (ba abun da aka ƙirƙira ba)
cmd.voice_start_done: An kunna sarrafawa ta murya. Faɗa umarni kamar “babban rubutu” ko “buɗe cibiyar malamai”. Faɗa “daina saurara” don ƙarewa.
cmd.voice_start_hint: AlloBot yana sauraron umarni har sai ka dakatar da shi
cmd.voice_stop_done: An kashe sarrafawa ta murya — an sako makirufo.
cmd.zen_on_done: An kunna yanayin zen — danna Ctrl+K sannan gudanar da “fita zen” don komawa.
palette.footer: Ana sanar da kowane aiki. Ctrl+K yana sauyawa.
palette.no_match: Babu umarni mai dacewa. Hirar bot (kuma nan ba da jimawa ba murya) tana fahimtar buƙatu na 'yanci.
palette.placeholder: Rubuta umarni — “babban rubutu”, “cibiyar malamai”, “karanta wannan shafin”…
cmd.set_ui_language_done: Mun nuna maka mai zaɓen yare a saman shafin — zaɓi yarenka a wurin.
cmd.set_ui_language_hint: Tsallaka zuwa mai zaɓen yare da ke saman shafin
cmd.set_ui_language_miss: Mai zaɓen yaren ƙatanga yana cikin sandar menu na sama.
cmd.open_allo_studio_hint: Ƙirƙiri fastoci, ƙasidu da takardun aiki masu sauƙin isa
cmd.open_cinematic_studio_hint: Ƙirƙiri gabatarwar fim da bidiyon bayani
cmd.open_lingua_practice_hint: Yi atisayen kalmomi da harshe daga tushen yanzu
cmd.open_open_groove_hint: Yi bugun kiɗa, salon synth da kiɗa mai fahimtar rubutun kiɗa
cmd.open_test_prep_hub_hint: Buɗe jerin atisaye kyauta da kayan karatu
cmd.open_timeline_studio_hint: Gina tare da tabbatar da jadawalin lokaci masu sauƙin isa
cmd.open_video_studio_hint: Nadi, saka rubutu da gyara bidiyon koyarwa
